title: WarCore
description:
Military Park (WarCore) which adds many mods to military action

The server requires the removal of some client mods (separate version)
body:
# GENERAL:

**WarCore** is a **military-themed modpack** featuring a large selection of high-quality mods that enhance immersion with a wide range of content — from vehicles and firearms to various military and other gear and accessories

## ⚠️ Highly Recommended External Mods

The following mods are highly recommended, but cannot be included in this modpack on Modrinth due to licensing restrictions:

**Immersive Vehicles (Forge - 1.20.1)**

**IAV (Forge – 1.20.1)**

**VEB (Forge – 1.20.1)**

**EndlessAmmo (Forge – 1.20.1)**

And also a mod dependent on endlessammo:

**MaxStuff (Forge – 1.20.1)**

👉 Download them from their official pages (e.g., CurseForge).



![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3825480eab8027a5ee54b7f95b7c4a60c235c66a_0.webp)
